text: The comparables were selected to demonstrate the marketability of four unit multi-family dwellings in Normal, IL of a similar age, GBA, condition, and room count. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 3.6% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, inferior condition, GBA, and lack of a patio. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, and GBA. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its sales concessions, site size, quality, GBA, and lack of a patio. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of market value.
